title: viola hirta subsp. permixta
intro: Viola hirta subsp. permixta, also known as the hairy violet, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the viola genus. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its high antioxidant content, which can help protect against cell damage and promote overall well-being. In herbal preparations, Viola hirta subsp. permixta is often used in infusions, tinctures, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
